title: Establishment and maintenance by parishes
doc_html:
PART II.  LAW LIBRARIES

§261.  Establishment and maintenance by parishes

The various parishes may respectively equip and maintain a law library for the use and benefit of the parish judges and officials.

PART II.  LAW LIBRARIES
§261.  Establishment and maintenance by parishes
